title: 3D Eggs
body:
This resource pack changes the look of chicken eggs in vanilla minecraft by giving them a 3D model. [Punchy!](https://modrinth.com/mod/punchy-fpa) or [Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) + [Gous's Hand Poses](https://modrinth.com/discover/resourcepacks?q=Gou) recommended, but optional.

¡both were used in the making of the showcase below!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8fqwvYW-YhQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<details>

You can do whatever you want with this pack, ¡but you have to credit me if you do! 

</details>
